subheadline: Security and privacy standards our platform is held to, reviewed annually by accredited third parties.

certifications.name: SOC 2 Type II
certifications.description: Controls for security, availability, and confidentiality, audited over a 12-month window.

certifications.name: ISO/IEC 27001
certifications.description: Certified information security management system covering people, process, and technology.

certifications.name: GDPR Ready
certifications.description: Data processing agreements, EU data residency, and a documented right-to-erasure workflow.

certifications.name: HIPAA Compliant
certifications.description: Safeguards and signed BAAs for handling protected health information at rest and in transit.
